---
title: "US Labor & Immigration Demographics"
description: "An interactive web application analyzing 11 years of statistically weighted ACS Census microdata for prime-age college graduates."
date: "2026-03-30"
image: /media/dashboard_screenshot.png
categories: ["R", "Shiny", "PostgreSQL", "Data Engineering"]
---

This dashboard pulls a pre-aggregated decade of US Census microdata from a cloud PostgreSQL database to visualize macroeconomic shifts in the labor market.

### Live Application

<iframe src="https://marioarceacosta.shinyapps.io/shiny/" width="100%" height="850px" style="border:none; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">

</iframe>
